member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarEndpointRouteBuilderExtensions.MapScalarApiReference(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps the Scalar API reference endpoint with the default endpoint prefix "/scalar".
member.param: The to which the endpoint will be added.
member.returns: An that can be used to further customize the endpoint.
member.remarks:
Redirects to the trailing slash from "/scalar" to "/scalar/".
You can also provide a document name as a route parameter in the browser (e.g., "/scalar/v1").

member.returns: An that can be used to further customize the endpoint.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarEndpointRouteBuilderExtensions.MapScalarApiReference(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder,System.String,System.Action{Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions})
member.summary: Maps the Scalar API reference endpoint with a custom endpoint prefix and options.
member.param: The to which the endpoint will be added.
The prefix for the endpoint.
An action to configure .
member.returns: An that can be used to further customize the endpoint.
member.exception: Thrown when the contains the '{documentName}' placeholder.
member.remarks:
Redirects to the trailing slash if does not end with a slash (e.g., from "/scalar" to "/scalar/").
You can also provide a document name as a route parameter in the browser (e.g., "/scalar/v1").
The parameter allows you to customize the base path where the Scalar API reference will be served.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.AddHeaderContent(Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Controls HTML content rendered in the header section of the page. This content will be embedded after the <body> tag and before the API Reference.
member.param: The to configure.
The additional content to include in the header section.
member.returns: The configured .
member.example:
The following is an example of how to use this method: AddHeaderContent("<header>Welcome to my API Reference</header>"); renders the following HTML:
<body> <header>Welcome to my API Reference</header> <script id="api-reference"></script> </body>
member.remarks: The provided content will be appended.

member.summary: Adds an OpenAPI document to the Scalar API Reference.
member.param: The options to configure.
The name identifier for the OpenAPI document. This value will be used to replace the '{documentName}' placeholder in the .
Optional display title for the document. If not provided, the document name will be used as the title.
Optional route pattern for the OpenAPI document. If not provided, the will be used. The pattern can include the '{documentName}' placeholder which will be replaced with the document name.
Indicates whether this document should be the default selection when multiple documents are available. Only one document should be marked as default.
Optional Agent Scalar key for this document.
member.remarks: When multiple documents are added, they will be displayed as selectable options in a dropdown menu. If no documents are explicitly added, a default document named 'v1' will be used.

The name of the security scheme as defined in the OpenAPI document.
An action to configure the API key authentication.

member.summary: Adds HTTP authentication configuration for a specific security scheme.
member.param: The options to configure.
The name of the security scheme as defined in the OpenAPI document.
An action to configure the HTTP authentication.

member.param: The options to configure.
The target to set.
The client to set.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.WithOpenApiRoutePattern``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Controls the route pattern of the OpenAPI document. Can also be a complete URL to a remote OpenAPI document, just be aware of CORS restrictions in this case. The pattern can include the '{documentName}' placeholder which will be replaced with the document name.
member.param: The options to configure.
The route pattern to set.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.WithDotNetFlag``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Controls whether to expose 'dotnet' flag to the configuration.
member.param: The options to configure.
Whether to expose 'dotnet'.
member.remarks: This flag is used internally to indicate that the API Reference is being served from a .NET application.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.WithClientButton``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the client button from the reference sidebar should be shown.
member.param: The options to configure.
Whether to show the client button.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.WithBaseServerUrl``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Controls the base server URL that will be used to prefix all relative OpenAPI server URLs.
member.param: The options to configure.
The base server URL to set.
member.remarks: When specified, this URL will be prepended to all relative server URLs defined in the OpenAPI document. For example, if BaseServerUrl is "https://api.example.com" and a server URL in the OpenAPI document is "/api", the resulting URL will be "https://api.example.com/api". This only affects relative server URLs; absolute URLs remain unchanged.

member.name: M:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptionsExtensions.WithPersistentAuthentication``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether authentication state should be persisted in local storage.
member.param: The options to configure.
Whether to persist authentication between page refreshes.

member.summary: Sets whether required properties should be ordered first in schema properties.
member.param: The options to configure.
Whether to order required properties first.

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions
member.summary: Represents all available options for the Scalar API Reference. Based on Configuration.
Represents all available options for the Scalar API Reference. Based on Configuration.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Title
member.summary: Controls the title of the HTML document.
member.remarks: Use the {documentName} placeholder to include the document name in the title. The placeholder only works when there is one document configured.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.BundleUrl
member.summary: Controls the bundle URL for the API Reference.
member.remarks: Use this option to load the API Reference from a different bundle or local server.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.CdnUrl
member.summary: Controls the CDN URL for the API Reference.
member.remarks: Use this option to load the API Reference from a different CDN or local server.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HeadContent
member.summary: Controls additional content included in the head section of the HTML document.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HeaderContent
member.summary: Controls HTML content rendered in the header section of the page. This content will be embedded after the <body> tag and before the API Reference.
member.example:
The following is an example of how to use this property: HeaderContent = "
Welcome to my API Reference
"; renders the following HTML:
Welcome to my API Reference

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DynamicBaseServerUrl
member.summary: Controls whether the base server URL should be dynamically determined based on the request context.
member.remarks: When set to true, the property will be overwritten and the base server URL will be dynamically adjusted based on the request context. This only works for relative server URLs.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.JavaScriptConfiguration
member.summary: Controls the path to a custom configuration JavaScript module.
member.remarks: If the path is relative, it will be normalized relative to the base path.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Favicon
member.summary: Controls the path or URL to a favicon for the documentation.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.OpenApiRoutePattern
member.summary: Controls the route pattern of the OpenAPI document. Can also be a complete URL to a remote OpenAPI document, just be aware of CORS restrictions in this case. The pattern can include the '{documentName}' placeholder which will be replaced with the document name.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ProxyUrl
member.summary: Controls the proxy URL for API requests.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ShowSidebar
member.summary: Controls whether the sidebar is shown (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.OperationTitleSource
member.summary: Controls whether the sidebar and search use the operation summary or path (default: ).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideModels
member.summary: Controls whether models are hidden from the sidebar, search, and content (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideDownloadButton
member.summary: Controls whether the "Download OpenAPI Specification" button is hidden.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideTestRequestButton
member.summary: Controls whether the "Test Request" button is hidden (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DarkMode
member.summary: Controls whether dark mode is enabled initially (default: disabled).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ForceThemeMode
member.summary: Forces the theme to always be in the specified state regardless of user preference.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideDarkModeToggle
member.summary: Controls whether the dark mode toggle is hidden (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.CustomCss
member.summary: Controls custom CSS passed directly to the component.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.SearchHotKey
member.summary: Controls the key used with CTRL/CMD to open the search modal (default: 'k').
member.remarks: For example, CMD+k or CTRL+k.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Theme
member.summary: Controls the color theme (default: ).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Layout
member.summary: Controls the layout for the Scalar API Reference (default: ).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DefaultFonts
member.summary: Controls whether to use the default fonts (Inter and JetBrains Mono from CDN) (default: enabled).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DefaultOpenAllTags
member.summary: Controls whether all tags are opened by default (default: only relevant tag opened).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ExpandAllModelSections
member.summary: Controls whether all model sections are expanded by default (default: collapsed).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ExpandAllResponses
member.summary: Controls whether all response sections are expanded by default in operations (default: collapsed).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideSearch
member.summary: Controls whether the sidebar search bar is hidden (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.TagSorter
member.summary: Controls the tag sorter for the Scalar API Reference.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.OperationSorter
member.summary: Controls the operation sorter for the Scalar API Reference.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HiddenClients
member.summary: Controls whether HTTPSnippet clients are hidden from the clients menu.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.EnabledClients
member.summary: Controls which HTTPSnippet clients are displayed in the clients menu.
member.remarks: If an empty array is sent, all options will be displayed.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.EnabledTargets
member.summary: Controls which HTTPSnippet targets are displayed in the clients menu.
member.remarks: If an empty array is sent, all options will be displayed.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Metadata
member.summary: Controls metadata information for configuring meta information out of the box.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Authentication
member.summary: Controls authentication options for prefilling credentials.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DefaultHttpClient
member.summary: Controls the default HTTP client (default: shell/curl).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Servers
member.summary: Controls the list of servers for the Scalar API Reference.
member.remarks: This list will override the servers defined in the OpenAPI document.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DotNetFlag
member.summary: Controls whether to expose 'dotnet' flag to the configuration.
member.remarks: This flag is used internally to indicate that the API Reference is being served from a .NET application.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.HideClientButton
member.summary: Controls whether the client button from the Reference sidebar is hidden (default: shown).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.BaseServerUrl
member.summary: Controls the base server URL that will be used to prefix all relative OpenAPI server URLs.
member.remarks: When specified, this URL will be prepended to all relative server URLs defined in the OpenAPI document. For example, if BaseServerUrl is "https://api.example.com" and a server URL in the OpenAPI document is "/api", the resulting URL will be "https://api.example.com/api". This only affects relative server URLs; absolute URLs remain unchanged.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.PersistentAuthentication
member.summary: Controls whether authentication state is persisted in local storage (default: not persisted).
member.remarks: When set to true, the authentication state will be stored in the browser's local storage and restored when the user returns to the page.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Telemetry
member.summary: Controls whether telemetry is enabled (default: enabled).
member.remarks: Telemetry tracks only whether a request was sent through the API client. We don't track who sent the request, what request was sent, or where it was sent to.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.DocumentDownloadType
member.summary: Controls the type of document download available for the API documentation (default: ).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.OrderRequiredPropertiesFirst
member.summary: Controls whether required properties are ordered first in schema properties (default: required first).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.SchemaPropertyOrder
member.summary: Controls the ordering method for schema properties (default: ).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ShowOperationId
member.summary: Controls whether the operation ID is shown in the UI (default: false).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.ShowDeveloperTools
member.summary: Controls the visibility of the developer tools toolbar.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Agent
member.summary: Agent Scalar (AI chat) options. Use to set a default key or disable Agent Scalar globally.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOptions.Mcp
member.summary: Model Context Protocol (MCP) options.
member.remarks: Configure MCP integration metadata and control whether MCP is disabled.

member.summary: Gets or sets the security schemes dictionary. This dictionary allows configuring multiple security schemes by name, enabling more flexible authentication configuration for OpenAPI operations. The key represents the security scheme name as defined in the OpenAPI document, and the value contains the configuration for that specific security scheme.

member.summary: Gets or sets the OAuth2 options. This can be used if the OpenApi document has a OAuth2 security scheme.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarAuthenticationOptions.Http
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTTP options. This can be used if the OpenApi document has a HTTP security scheme.

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarApiKeySecurityScheme
member.summary: Represents a security scheme that uses HTTP header authentication.
member.remarks: This scheme is used to prefill or overwrite HTTP header values for authentication purposes when making API requests. It allows specifying a custom header name and value pair.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarApiKeySecurityScheme.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the HTTP header to be used for authentication.
member.remarks: Common examples include "Authorization", "X-API-Key", or custom header names.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarApiKeySecurityScheme.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the HTTP header to be used for authentication.
member.remarks: This value will be sent as-is in the specified header. For example, "Bearer token123" or "ApiKey abc123".

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarHttpSecurityScheme
member.summary: Represents a security scheme that uses HTTP authentication mechanisms like Basic or Bearer.
member.remarks: This scheme is used to prefill or overwrite authentication values. It supports both Basic authentication (username/password) and Bearer authentication (token).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarHttpSecurityScheme.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username used for HTTP basic authentication.
member.remarks: When provided, this value will be used to prefill or overwrite the username for Basic authentication requests.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarHttpSecurityScheme.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the password used for HTTP basic authentication.
member.remarks: When provided, this value will be used to prefill or overwrite the password for Basic authentication requests.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarHttpSecurityScheme.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the token used for HTTP bearer authentication.
member.remarks: When provided, this value will be used to prefill or overwrite the token for Bearer authentication requests.

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOAuth2SecurityScheme
member.summary: Represents a security scheme that uses OAuth 2.0 authentication.
member.remarks: This scheme is used to prefill or overwrite OAuth 2.0 authentication values when making API requests. It specifies flows and default scopes to be used during the authorization process.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOAuth2SecurityScheme.Flows
member.summary: Gets or sets the OAuth 2.0 flows configuration for this security scheme.
member.remarks: Contains configuration for different OAuth flow types like implicit, password, client credentials, or authorization code. The configured flows determine how the authentication process is handled.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarOAuth2SecurityScheme.DefaultScopes
member.summary: Gets or sets the default OAuth 2.0 scopes to request during authorization.
member.remarks: These scopes are prefilled or used to overwrite the requested scopes when initiating the OAuth flow.

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarSecurityScheme
member.summary: Represents the base class for security schemes in Scalar.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarSecurityScheme.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of this security scheme.

member.name: T:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarAgentOptions
member.summary: Options for Agent Scalar (AI chat in the API reference).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarAgentOptions.Key
member.summary: Agent Scalar key. Required for production; on localhost a limited free tier is available.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarAgentOptions.Disabled
member.summary: When true, disables Agent Scalar for this scope (global or per-document).

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.CredentialsLocationExtensions.EnumParseOptions.AllowMatchingMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the value of the selected metadata value attribute values applied to an enum should be used as the parse value for an enum.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , so the value of any metadata attributes on the enum values are ignored. Set to to enable parsing using the applicable MetadataSource for each enum member.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.CredentialsLocationExtensions.EnumParseOptions.EnableNumberParsing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value defining whether numbers should be parsed as a fallback when other parsing fails.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , and numbers will be parsed as well as names.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.PropertyOrderExtensions.EnumParseOptions.AllowMatchingMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the value of the selected metadata value attribute values applied to an enum should be used as the parse value for an enum.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , so the value of any metadata attributes on the enum values are ignored. Set to to enable parsing using the applicable MetadataSource for each enum member.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.PropertyOrderExtensions.EnumParseOptions.EnableNumberParsing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value defining whether numbers should be parsed as a fallback when other parsing fails.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , and numbers will be parsed as well as names.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarLayoutExtensions.EnumParseOptions.ComparisonType
member.summary: Gets or sets the to use during parsing.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , and a case-sensitive comparison will be used.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarLayoutExtensions.EnumParseOptions.AllowMatchingMetadataAttribute
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the value of the selected metadata value attribute values applied to an enum should be used as the parse value for an enum.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , so the value of any metadata attributes on the enum values are ignored. Set to to enable parsing using the applicable MetadataSource for each enum member.

member.name: P:Scalar.AspNetCore.ScalarLayoutExtensions.EnumParseOptions.EnableNumberParsing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value defining whether numbers should be parsed as a fallback when other parsing fails.
member.remarks: By default, it's set to , and numbers will be parsed as well as names.

member.summary: Gets whether the value of any metadata attributes applied to an enum member should be used as the ToString() value for the enum.
